creator: pawel@zielin.pl
text:
Freebsd 14.0-p6

After git pull in /usr/ports i tried recompile mail/opendkim. After I made 'make clean && make reinstall' I've got error that /usr/local/bin/autoreconf2.72 doesn't exist. 
After symlink /usr/local/bin/autoreconf2.71 to /usr/local/bin/autoreconf2.72 opendkim compiled successfullly.
